challenge.label: Road to Mallorca — 15,000 km as a team

highlights.title: Road to Mallorca
highlights.text: Together you've covered 573.1 of 15000 km (3.8%) toward the team goal.

highlights.title: Most balanced
highlights.text: Ebi's swim/bike/run split is the most even — a true triathlete's engine.
